creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
(In reply to Michael Moll from comment #1)

> this probably will break at least redmine, could you test if redmine is still 
> working with LDAP after patching its gemspec?

Can you explain why you think this could break redmine? At the first look i did not see a problem, but with a pointer of you i will take a depper look. (Or will Michael F. make to do this ;))
